description: Configure the 'ne:ne_countries' layer in GeoServer (http://localhost:8080/geoserver, admin / Admin123!) for production delivery. Enable HTTP Response Cache Headers with a cache time of 86400 seconds. Configure the WMS Attribution for the layer with the title 'Provided by Natural Earth', logo URL 'http://localhost:8080/geoserver/ne_logo.png', logo type 'image/png', width 88, and height 31.
